blockingIssues.description: The global Space hotkey in `src/teleprompter/TeleprompterView.tsx` hijacks Space on focused toolbar buttons in edit mode, prevents their default activation, and toggles playback instead. That breaks keyboard access to the teleprompter control cluster.

The exit handler wraps `unregisterHotkeys()`, `exitTeleprompter()`, and local mode reset in one `try`, so if hotkey cleanup rejects the overlay never exits and local state stays stuck in teleprompter mode.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align the skill with accepted validation-heavy and small-fix workflows: either make companion-skill invocations / RED-first runs optional for test-only or verification-only sessions, or require workers to record explicit deviations and set `followedProcedure` accurately when they skip those steps.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Overlay reviews for `teleprompter-viewport-reading-hud`, `teleprompter-controls-snap`, `teleprompter-navigation-exit-drag-resize`, `teleprompter-autoscroll-viewportmath-hotkeys-sync`, and `cross-area-mode-switching-flows` all reported the same mismatch between `frontend-redesign` procedure requirements and what workers actually did before still reporting `followedProcedure: true`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Stop instructing workers to read `.factory/library/README.md` unless that file exists, or add a real library index file that points to the current shared knowledge documents.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Overlay reviews for `teleprompter-controls-snap`, `teleprompter-navigation-exit-drag-resize`, and `teleprompter-autoscroll-viewportmath-hotkeys-sync` all observed transcript attempts to read `.factory/library/README.md`, but `D:\coding\somewhat\.factory\library` only contains `architecture.md`, `environment.md`, and `user-testing.md`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Reword `VAL-CROSS-006` so it matches the app's two-window architecture: the backend `mode-changed` event updates overlay-window mode/edit state, rather than acting like a generic editor↔teleprompter route switch in a single App instance.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `cross-area-mode-switching-flows` review found the current contract wording misleading during review because `src/App.tsx` forces the overlay App instance into teleprompter mode while `src-tauri/src/commands/window_mode.rs` emits `mode-changed` only to the overlay window for entry/edit transitions.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repo-level completion guidance and the feature handoff verification gate are out of sync because one overlay feature handoff listed only frontend tests, typecheck, and lint instead of `npm test`.
